text: You, knowing that this debtor has been hounding you for days, decide to take drastic measures. You decide that the only way out of this pickle is through the window and with a running start you launch yourself out of there. For a second all is peaceful and your worldly troubles seem so small from a 3rd story window, then you realize you never really thought about how you would land and the rapidly approaching ground gives you too little time to think, you take a nap after swan diving into the ground… [New Game]
